context_notes: This is a career-helper session, not a GSD phase. User is Dylan Nguyen, IT Technician II in Rosemead CA. Two active applications: SCAQMD (submitted 6/19), City of LA IT Specialist (Applications Programmer) (deadline 7/2/2026). The LA role is a developer-track position tested 100% by multiple-choice exam (Aug 25-31 2026). CV qualifies via BS Computer Science from Cal Poly Pomona. Key differentiator from SCAQMD: LA role rewards scripting/programming/integration experience over pure sysadmin. PDF generation command: Chrome headless --print-to-pdf on HTML output from pandoc.
